nasb.text: “This is the way the Lord has dealt with me in the days when He looked with favor upon me, to take away my disgrace among men.”

esv.text: “Thus the Lord has done for me in the days when he looked on me, to take away my reproach among people.”

cnv.text: “主在眷顧的日子，這樣看待我，要把我在人間的羞恥除掉。”

ccb.text: 她说：“主真是眷顾我，除掉了我不生育的羞耻。”

csbs.text: “为了除去我在人间的耻辱，主在这些眷顾的日子里，这样看待了我。”
